# Kiran's Fitness Club

> Anjananagar's premier gym on Magadi Main Road, Bangalore — offering expert personal training, modern equipment, and affordable membership plans.

## About

Kiran's Fitness Club is a professional fitness center located at 9, 10, Shivakrupa Complex, E W College Main Rd, Bharath Nagar, 1st Stage, Bedarahalli, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560091, India.

Founded by Mr. Bangalore Kiran Kumar — a fitness professional with 20+ years of experience and 4000+ members trained — the club provides world-class gym facilities to residents of Anjananagar, Magadi Road, Rajajinagar, Vijayanagar, and surrounding areas.

## Services

- Full gym access with premium imported strength equipment
- Certified personal training (1-on-1 sessions)
- Group fitness classes (HIIT, CrossFit basics, strength training)
- Custom diet and nutrition planning
- Cardio and stretching zones
- Spacious locker facilities

## Membership Plans

- 1 Day Pass: ₹200/day
- Monthly Plan: ₹1,500/month
- Quarterly Plan: ₹3,000/3 months
- Half-Yearly Plan: ₹5,000/6 months
- Annual Plan: ₹8,000/year (+ 1 MONTH FREE)

## Opening Hours

- Monday to Saturday: 5:30 AM – 10:00 PM
- Sunday: 7:00 AM – 12:00 PM
